title: Astral
description:
The modpack for the AstralSMP server on COZY.

Icon by _emjem
body:
# What is Astral SMP?
Astral SMP brings an immersive, active playstyle that lets you dive into a rich world filled with magic, machinery, and countless adventures. With popular mods like Create, Iron's Spellbooks, Farmer's Delight, Lootr, and many others, Astral SMP offers a fresh and dynamic experience. Like its predecessor Cozy, Astral is frequently updated to provide players with a continually evolving gameplay environment, featuring its own unique set of custom origins.

![Astral](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b29749a300df912f7ec954d38993f09413c8e48.png)

# So, What Can You Do?
In Astral SMP, there's always a new journey waiting for you. Whether you're drawn to mastering spells, crafting complex machinery, or exploring the world with friends, there's a role to fit every adventurer's playstyle. Join others as a powerful Wizard, a skilled Mechanic, or, if you're daring, you might even **Feed the flesh**!

![With the power of friendship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa91d8b4c9c11d48cf58c442dcff1c9e97bd6f32.png)

# Origins, You Say?
That's right! Astral SMP offers an impressive range of custom origins, many of which are exclusive to this server, crafted by a dedicated development team. You can explore a variety of these unique origins [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lunas-origins) and discover even more in-game, giving you endless ways to shape your character's story and abilities.

![Nothing happening here....](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c92c311cd6e64c50e4aa2a9e99c8dcbefeb4eccc.png)

# How do I join???
Just download the modpack, its that simple. For future updates we recommend joining the Discord Server. If you like Astral, Check out [CozySMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cozy-smp)!! But... no matter which server you choose... you'll **never** escape the **chaos.**
